motion_goal: group subtle life: blinks, small head turns, phone-hand micro-moves
runway_prompt: Five teens in a night forest lit by embers and phone screens; ultra subtle character idle loop: small eye blinks, slight head turns, weight shift; no walking; keep framing and lighting consistent; moody PG-13 tone
negative_prompt: no running, no big camera moves, no horror distortions, no face melting, no extra people
notes: Keep noise low; prefer natural micro-movement; retain original aspect/resolution

motion_goal: two-shot life: Ava small breath, glance; partner slight nod
runway_prompt: Two teens in medium shot at night; subtle breath and micro glance from left subject; tiny nod from right; keep hands mostly still; phones dimly glow
negative_prompt: no walk cycles, no camera push, no mouth flapping, no jump cuts

motion_goal: argue beat: gentle gesture, head turns, no lip sync
runway_prompt: Two teens arguing in wind; slight hand gesture and head turns only; wind teases coals; maintain composition
negative_prompt: no shouting faces, no exaggerated lip sync, no fast arm swings, no camera zoom

motion_goal: hands flip stones minimally; fingers move
runway_prompt: Close hands flipping small stones around embers; fingers minimal movement; tiny ember shifts
negative_prompt: no big rock throws, no sparks bursts, no camera shake

motion_goal: phones-as-light: screen glow pulse, tiny head reactions
runway_prompt: Group lit by phone screens only; slow pulsing phone glow; micro head/eye reactions to light; keep darkness intact
negative_prompt: no bright flares, no new light sources, no hard camera moves

motion_goal: group resolve: micro nods, shared breath
runway_prompt: Group huddle at night; tiny shared breath condensation and subtle nods; no steps
negative_prompt: no fog walls, no camera truck, no mouth animation
